camera: Single character portrait, standing upright in a confident combat-ready pose, facing the viewer at a slight three-quarter angle, full body centered and filling most of the frame with a little headroom.
style: Stylized low-poly 3D render — angular faceted planes of flat color with crisp hard-edged light and shadow, clean strong silhouette, dramatic rim lighting, a game hero-unit / concept-art look (not photoreal, not painterly-soft). Anthropomorphic armored warrior animal wearing sci-fi plate armor (pauldrons, chest plate with a small glowing core, gauntlets, utility belt) and carrying a weapon.
palette: Grounded, slightly desaturated fur tones with battle-worn metal armor in cool gunmetal, and one saturated glowing accent color (energy blade / core / eyes). Reads clearly against a dark UI.
background: Fully transparent background — the character is completely isolated with no backdrop, no scenery, no ground, no shadow plane, nothing behind it — a clean cut-out game sprite.
constraints: Exactly one character, centered. No text, no logos, no watermarks, no UI elements, no labels, no callout lines, no drop shadow outside the subject, no border.
